title: medicago lupulina var. hispida
intro: Medicago lupulina var. hispida, also known as prickly medic or hispid medick, is a subspecies of the annual legume plant Medicago lupulina. It is a type of plant that has been used for its medicinal and edible properties. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce the risk of infection. Prickly medic is often prepared as a tea or tincture and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
